source: The meeting is scheduled for Friday morning.
Please submit the report by end of day.
reference: Tafadhali wasilisha ripoti mwishoni mwa siku.

source: Can you help me with this task?
The project deadline has been extended.
reference: Muda wa mwisho wa mradi umepanuliwa.

source: We need to discuss the budget.
The conference starts at nine o'clock.
reference: Mkutano mkubwa unaanza saa tatu asubuhi.

source: Your feedback is very important to us.
reference: Maoni yako ni muhimu sana kwetu.
